zh.lifeSummary: 當Daniel Livermore於1579年7月19日之前出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉文哈姆時，他的父親Richard Livermore30歲，母親Alise Cloughe34歲。他於1605年與Elizabeth Hammond在英國素福爾可蕾托 瑟洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1633年之前在英國艾可維瑟斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Daniel Livermore于1579年7月19日之前出生在英国英格兰素福爾可拉文哈姆时，他的父亲Richard Livermore30岁，母亲Alise Cloughe34岁。他于1605年与Elizabeth Hammond在英国素福爾可蕾托 瑟洛福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1633年之前在英国艾可維瑟斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Livermore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from Livermere in Suffolk. This is first found in the form Leuuremer (c. 1050), which suggests derivation from Old English lǣfer ‘rush, reed’ + mere ‘lake’. However, later forms consistently show i in the first syllable, suggesting Old English lifer ‘liver’, referring either to the shape of the pond or to the coagulation of the water.

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Daniel Livermore was born before 19 July 1579, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Livermore, was 30 and his mother, Alise Cloughe, was 34. He married Elizabeth Hammond in 1605, in Little Thurlow, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 1633, in Wethersfield, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Daniel Livermore est né avant 19 juillet 1579, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Livermore, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alise Cloughe, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hammond en 1605, à Little Thurlow, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1633, à Wethersfield, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Daniel Livermore vor 19. Juli 1579 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Livermore 30 und seine Mutter Alise Cloughe 34. Er hat 1605 in Little Thurlow, Suffolk, England Elizabeth Hammond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1633 in Wethersfield, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel Livermore è nato il prima del 19 luglio 1579 nel Lavenham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Livermore, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alise Cloughe, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hammond nel 1605, nel Little Thurlow, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1633, nel Wethersfield, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Daniel Livermoreが1579年7月19日以前にイギリスイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父Richard Livermoreは30歳，母Alise Clougheは34歳であった。1605年にイギリススフォルクリットル スウルロウでElizabeth Hammondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1633年以前にイギリスエセックスウエスエルスフィールドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Daniel Livermore(이)가 1579년 7월 19일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Livermore(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alise Cloughe(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1605년 영국 수폴크 리틀 스를로에서 Elizabeth Hammond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1633년 이전 영국 에세스 w더스필드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel Livermore nasceu antes 19 de julho de 1579, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Livermore, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alise Cloughe, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hammond em 1605, em Little Thurlow, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1633, em Wethersfield, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Daniel Livermore родился перед 19 июля 1579 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Livermore было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alise Cloughe, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hammond в 1605 г. в местности литл турлоу, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1633 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, эссекс, Англия.
